title: Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Betrayal}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:Jabba4.jpg]] |title=''Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal'' |writer=[[Jim Woodring]] |penciller=[[Art Wetherell]] |inker=[[Monty Sheldon]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[Pamela Rambo]] |cover artist=[[Mark Harrison]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[February 20]], [[1996]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54267/star_wars_jabba_the_hutt_-_betrayal_1995_1|text=Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt - Betrayal (1995) #1}} |pages=32 |upc= |timeline=[[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]]The date of this story is established by {{DarkHorse|url=Zones/StarWars/Timeline|text=Comics Timeline}} in relation to {{Film|IV}}, which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. |series=''[[Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt]]'' |issue=4 |prev=[[Jabba the Hutt: The Dynasty Trap|''The Dynasty Trap'']] }} '''''Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal''''' was the fourth and final issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt]]'' series of one-shot comics. It was released by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[February 20]], [[1996]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Everyone hopes to get a big break someday, move up to the top seat in their line of work. But when that line of work is intergalactic crime, you've got to make your own breaks. Bib Fortuna, Jabba's loyal lieutenant, has plotted a slave revolt against the Hutt. We've seen how Jabba handles negotiations—now we'll see how he handles ''Betrayal''.'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=Jabba the Hutt
Betrayal |text=After his explosive encounter with Princess Nampi, Jabba the Hutt attempted to sell the captured Nuffin freighter to Cabrool Nuum. Nuum's treacherous children seized the opportunity to concoct an intricate patricidal plot, from which Jabba carefully extricated himself by killing the entire family. With fifteen korgs of spice added to the spoils of their journey, Jabba and his crew finally return home ... to Tatooine.}} ==Plot summary== {{Plot|comic}} ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal}} ===Collected in=== *''[[Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt: The Art of the Deal]]'' *''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 2]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 4]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: The Empire Omnibus Vol. 3]]'' ==Appearances== {{App |characters= *[[Buboicullaar/Legends|Buboicullaar]] *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] *[[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] *[[Miramba]] {{1st}} *[[Mog]] {{1stm}} *[[Nivek (criminal)|Nivek]] {{1st}} *[[Gru'um Ropple]] {{1st}} *[[Smeberellich]] {{1stm}} |organisms= *[[Murripin]] {{Mo}} *[[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] {{Mo}} |droids= |events= |locations= *[[Natinati]] {{1stm}} **[[Poborandurannum]] {{1stm}} *[[Nuswatta]] {{1stm}} **[[Forbidden Gardens of Nuswatta/Legends|Forbidden Gardens of Nuswatta]] {{1stm}} *[[Spunchina]] {{1stm}} *[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] **[[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] |organizations= |species= *[[Frecker]] {{1st}} *[[Frog-dog/Legends|Frog-dog]] *[[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] *[[Gran/Legends|Gran]] *[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] *[[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] *[[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] *[[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] *[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] *[[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] |vehicles= *[[Minstrel-class space yacht/Legends|''Minstrel''-class space yacht]] **[[Star Jewel/Legends|''Star Jewel'']] |technology= *[[Blaster/Legends|Blaster]] *[[Hoversled/Legends|Hoversled]] |miscellanea= *[[Aramanoo]] {{Mo}} *[[Hookah pipe/Legends|Hookah pipe]] *[[Scrobb]] {{1st}} *[[Wineskin]] {{1stm}} }} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54267/star_wars_jabba_the_hutt_-_betrayal_1995_1|text=Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt - Betrayal (1995) #1}} {{Interlang |ka=ჰატი ჯაბა: ღალატი |nl=Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal |pl=Jabba: Zdradzony |pt=Jabba o Hutt: Traição }} [[Category:Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt one-shots|04]]
